race.comment: SPARKLING LUCK (2) comes through a string of strong runs over the border, the latest midfield at Pakenham in richer company. Best figures measure up and with the blinkers added gets his chance. GOOD EXPECTATIONS (6) was runner-up first two from a spell then scored last time at the provincials. Tricky gate but hard to fault and can measure up again. WIND RUSH (3) was fair fresh then just missed second-up. Looks well placed here and should be at top. ORLOVA (10) resumes but looks suited by the longer journey fresh. Placed 3/3 this trip and should be primed to run well. LISELLE'S LUCK (11) is overdue for a win and down on the minimum can give a sight at odds.
